zh.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Whipple於1523年出生在英國英格蘭艾可波金時，她的父親Matthew II Whipple18歲，母親Sarah Anna Hawkins 10 ggm16歲。她於1539年與John Annable在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1549年在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年26歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Whipple
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname from an unrecorded diminutive of Middle English w(h)ippe ‘scourge, whip’, possibly contained in Middle English whippel-tre, a type of dogwood or cornus. For possible applications as a nickname see Whipp . Alternatively, perhaps from an unrecorded diminutive of the Middle English personal name Wippe (see Whipp ).

History: Matthew Whipple came from England to Ipswich, MA, c. 1638. His descendent William Whipple (1730–85) born in Kittery, ME, was a signer of the Declaration of Independence. A John Whipple was one of the first settlers in Providence, RI.

variants.name: Whipp
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Wippe (Old English Wippa, of unexplained etymology but apparently attested in the Isle of Wight placename Whippingham and in an Anglo-Saxon field name Wippan hoh ‘Wippa's hill-spur’). Alternatively, perhaps from Middle English whip(pe), wipp(e) ‘whip’, either as an occupational name for someone who used a whip, as corporal punishment or to drive or control animals, or a nickname for a lively, quick-moving person, or someone generally in a hurry.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Whipple was born in 1523, in Bocking, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Matthew II Whipple, was 18 and her mother, Sarah Anna Hawkins 10 ggm, was 16. She married John Annable in 1539, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1549, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Annable en 1539, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1549, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Whipple(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 보킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew II Whipple(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Anna Hawkins 10 ggm(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1539년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 John Annable(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1549년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

ru.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Whipple родилась в 1523 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Matthew II Whipple было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Anna Hawkins 10 ggm, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Annable в 1539 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1549 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
